name: Regression: Auto on Write
description: After any write tool modifies source files, run the matching Playwright regression test.

then.prompt:
If the file just written is inside src/features/ or src/pages/ or src/App.jsx or css/styles.css, determine which module was affected and run the matching Playwright test. Silently skip if the file is not a source file.

Mapping:
- src/features/holdings/** or src/pages/HoldingsPage.jsx → run: cd [TEST_ROOT] && npx cross-env LANG=th ENV=sit npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts tests-web/[SYSTEM]/holdings/holdings.spec.ts --reporter=line
- src/features/tax/** or src/pages/TaxPage.jsx → run: cd [TEST_ROOT] && npx cross-env LANG=th ENV=sit npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts tests-web/[SYSTEM]/tax/tax.spec.ts --reporter=line
- src/App.jsx or src/components/** or css/** → run: cd [TEST_ROOT] && npx cross-env LANG=th ENV=sit npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --reporter=line

Report the test results concisely.
